context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.role: Active feeding state triggered when player provides seeds to Echo
context.screen_position: Center at x=64px, y=60px, but head moves toward food bowl during animation (head reaches toward x=16-24px range)
adjacent_elements: cage_food_bowl (target of eating action at x=16px, y=100px)
seed (visible in food bowl, consumed during animation)
context.usage_scenario: Plays once when player taps feed button and food bowl has seeds. Animation shows Echo leaning down to food bowl, pecking seeds, and returning upright. Increases happiness by +15 points. Transitions back to idle after completion.

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel bending forward and down toward food bowl. Body tilts approximately 30-45 degrees from vertical. Neck extends downward. Beak opens and closes during pecking motion.
visual_specification.texture: Pure pixel art with no gradients. Hand-drawn frame-by-frame animation showing organic movement.

animation.description: Frame 1: Start leaning forward, head tilts down 15 degrees. Frame 2: Body leans further, head moves down 8-10px. Frame 3: Head reaches lowest point near food bowl, beak closed. Frame 4: Beak opens (3-4px gap). Frame 5: Beak closes with seed, head starts rising. Frame 6: Return to upright position, seed consumed. Total duration: 1.5 seconds.

visual_specification.details: Beak opens to 3-4px width at widest point (frame 4). Head moves approximately 10-12px downward from resting position. Crest remains in neutral position throughout. Eyes remain open. One seed (3x3px) disappears from food bowl between frames 4-5. Feet remain planted on perch.

relationships.shared_with: Same base body structure and colors as all Echo states
relationships.differences_from: Unlike idle: body is tilted/leaning, head position changes significantly, beak opens/closes. Unlike other states: specifically oriented toward food bowl location, involves seed consumption.

explicit_negations: No speed lines or motion effects
